calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Continued For Letter To Jun-23-10 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 612

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael A. Mooney, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sterling Funding, LLC, a limited liability company.
No appearance by defendant Karim Bustami, individually and dba Designer Rug Outlet.
Default was entered against defendant on Setpember 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed October 5, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, November 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Sterling Funding, LLC, a limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Karim Bustami, individually and dba Designer Rug Outlet as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,668.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,509.83.
Attorney Fees - $4,500.00.
Costs - $455.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $46,132.83.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
